name: Ajwain-Flavored Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cut each chicken piece into thirds lengthwise, then crosswise into 3/4- to 1-inch segments.
3. Place all ingredients (except for 1 tablespoon of oil) in a bowl and mix well. Set aside for 15 to 30 minutes or longer, covering and refrigerating if necessary.
4. Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large non-stick frying pan over high heat.
5. When very hot, add the chicken pieces.
6. Stir-fry until the chicken pieces are lightly browned or opaque on the outside.
7. Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and cover loosely with lightly oiled wax paper. The wax paper should be inside the dish and directly on the chicken pieces (Why wax paper and not foil?).
8. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the chicken pieces are cooked through.
9. If not eating immediately, remove the chicken pieces from the baking dish to prevent them from drying out.
Serves 3-4 as main.
